stories.title: Yamamoto Throws First Complete Game of His MLB Career
stories.angle: Sixty-six starts in the majors. He went the distance for the first time — in Yankee Stadium, with zero walks.

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Yoshinobu Yamamoto just threw the first complete game of his MLB career.

66 starts. First one to go the distance.

9 innings. 4 hits. 0 walks. 7 strikeouts. Dodgers 8, Yankees 2.

Dominant doesn't cover it. #Dodgers #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Yamamoto's complete game by the numbers:

102 pitches. 9 innings. 4 hits. 0 walks. 7 strikeouts.

The Dodgers saved their entire bullpen for the nightcap. And he made it easy.

Dodgers 8, Yankees 2. #Dodgers #Yankees #MLB

article.headline: First Time in 66 Starts: Yoshinobu Yamamoto Throws a Complete Game

stories.title: Red Sox Win 13th Straight — Longest Streak Since 1948
stories.angle: Longest Red Sox win streak since 1948. They're 50-48. The franchise record is 15.

x_posts.label: Post 2
x_posts.text:
The Boston Red Sox just won their 13th game in a row.

They beat the Rays 6-1 Sunday. Thirteen straight — the franchise's longest win streak since 1948.

Boston is now 50-48. The franchise record is 15 consecutive wins.

The streak is real. #RedSox #MLB

article.headline: Thirteen Straight. The Boston Red Sox Have Not Lost Since July 3.

stories.title: Ohtani's July 22 Start Is Canceled — Left Knee Irritation, No Timeline
stories.angle: He's still hitting. He's not pitching for at least two to three weeks. With August 3 approaching and the postseason in view, the Dodgers need their ace healthy.

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Shohei Ohtani will not pitch Wednesday.

His July 22 start against the Phillies has been canceled — left knee irritation.

Dodgers manager Dave Roberts: "Going to be some time."

Ohtani continues to hit. He was 2-for-5 with 2 RBI on Sunday. #Dodgers #MLB

stories.title: Skubal Trade Deadline — Five Teams In, Price Still "Outrageous"
stories.angle: Five teams. Fourteen days. The asking price hasn't moved. One exec calls it outrageous.

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Tarik Skubal deadline update:

Active suitors: Cubs, Braves, Rays, Dodgers, Phillies.

Detroit's ask: controllable pitching + position players near big-league ready.

One NL exec called it "outrageous." 14 days to August 3. #Tigers #MLB

article.headline: Five Teams Are In On Tarik Skubal. Detroit's Price Tag Is Still "Outrageous."

stories.title: Colson Montgomery Hits No. 24 — White Sox Blank Blue Jays 3-0
stories.angle: Montgomery's 24th. The White Sox are 51-46, leading the AL Central.

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Colson Montgomery hit his 24th home run of the season Sunday.

The White Sox shut out the Blue Jays 3-0 at Rogers Centre. Sean Burke got the win.

Chicago is 51-46 and leads the AL Central. #WhiteSox #MLB

article.headline: Colson Montgomery Hits No. 24. White Sox Blank Toronto 3-0.
